description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a cross-gabled roof covered in gray shingles and a prominent front porch supported by wooden posts. The exterior walls are finished in a light cream color with wooden trim along the base and around the windows and doors. The front facade features a central entrance with a small wooden deck and steps, flanked by a large window on one side. The side and rear elevations have additional windows and a secondary door, providing ample natural light and access. The property is set on a rectangular grassy plot with a paved driveway leading to a covered carport on one side. In front of the house, there are three freestanding signboards or display boards, suggesting a possible sales or informational function.
description: A single-story cream-colored bungalow with a cross-gabled gray shingle roof, front porch, and wooden trim, set on a grassy plot with a driveway and display boards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch, large window, driveway, and three display boards on the lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cross-gabled roof, the wooden porch, and the driveway leading to the carport.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back door, additional windows, and the full length of the building without the display boards.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch, the side of the house, and the display boards from a different angle.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
